description: Aggregation queries on the largest pilot dataset blow past 2s. Add pre-aggregation + caching to bring p99 under 800ms.
title: Reduce dashboard query p99 under 800ms on large datasets

description: Spec the cohort comparison widget for the Northstar dashboard. Pilot customers want side-by-side retention by signup month.
title: Cohort comparison widget for retention by signup month

description: Add dark mode color tokens to the dashboard design system so charts stay legible on dark backgrounds.
title: Add dark mode tokens to dashboard design system

description: Migrate legacy dashboard request logs to structured JSON so we can trace slow queries by customer.
title: Migrate dashboard request logs to structured format

description: Chart-render snapshot tests are flaky in CI and block merges. Stabilize before feature freeze.
title: Stabilize flaky chart-render tests in CI

description: Document the pilot rollout runbook: feature flags, data backfill, and rollback steps for each beta account.
title: Write pilot rollout runbook

description: Pilot customers want scheduled CSV/email exports of dashboard views. Define scope for v1.
title: Scheduled CSV export for dashboard views

description: Add rate-limit headers to the public analytics API so enterprise scripts can back off gracefully.
title: Add rate-limit headers to public analytics API

description: Set up a canary release path for the v2 dashboard renderer ahead of GA.
title: Set up canary release for v2 dashboard renderer

description: Dashboard header shifts on first paint when the date-range picker loads. Reserve layout space.
title: Fix layout shift on dashboard header

description: New workspaces hit a blank dashboard with no sample data. Add a guided empty state to lift activation.
title: Guided empty state for new analytics workspaces

description: Design the A/B test for the enterprise analytics tier price point. Define metrics and guardrails with Ryan.
title: Design A/B test for enterprise analytics tier pricing

description: Roll out the unified tracking plan across activation and dashboard events; reconcile with the data warehouse.
title: Roll out unified tracking plan across activation events

description: Build the onboarding funnel drop-off report so we can see where new accounts stall.
title: Onboarding funnel drop-off report

description: Consolidate biweekly pilot feedback into a prioritized list for the pre-freeze planning review with Carlos.
title: Consolidate pilot feedback for pre-freeze planning

description: Duplicate of NS-207 scope; canceled in favor of the consolidated scheduled-export work.
title: Export permission check returns 500 for viewer role

title: Dark mode chart legibility on dashboard surfaces

title: Cache pre-aggregated cohort queries

title: Scheduled CSV digest for pilot accounts

title: Fix WAA query wired to exec dashboard

title: Dark mode pass on dashboard cards

description: Saved views drop the filter state on reload. Persist to the tenant config.
title: Saved views persistence bug

description: Exporter times out past 500k rows. Stream and paginate the export.
title: Report exporter edge cases for large datasets
